race.comment: This race has been decimated by scratchings and it leaves KIWI JENNI (13) clearly on top. She came away for a strong maiden win second up, settling back at Seymour but proving too good late. Off a let-up here is the little niggle but she should take holding out again. DEADLY PRESS (1) was a tough winner at Seymour last time and there's been winning form out of that. He finds another winnable affair now and should get a decent run midfield. Doubt he has to do much more to win again. FYRELINE (5) was a narrow maiden winner fresh, unable to back it up last time but he's open to plenty of improvement. CASH CONVERTER (3) wasn't bad at big odds last time having won in easier prior, he can figure in the placings.
